title: Sky Lantern
description: Sea Lantern? I only know Sky Lantern
body:
![Sky Lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7951df3b2f4505670aae3af9d2d7b326198a2dc1.png)

# What does this change?

It changes one thing, it makes the sea lantern texture, the same as the sky, well it doesnt look much good but dont blame me, blame the minecraft shadows

# Does this work before the update _1.21.3_?

Yes

# What will happen on _August 12 2036_?

August 12 2036, the heat death of the universe.
